svg.title: 3-stage NPU pipeline: DMA, Systolic Array, and VPU overlap across time
svg.desc: Gantt chart showing DMA loading the next layer while systolic array computes the current layer and VPU post-processes the previous layer.

g.text: idle (waiting for all FPGA layers to complete, then runs Detect head on final outputs)

svg.text: steady-state: DMA always one layer ahead — 3 units running in parallel
